\tzpentry{ID4643}{Field Strength Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4643 introduces Field Strength Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\mathcal{F}_{\lambda\mu\nu} = \nabla_\lambda \mathcal{M}_{\mu\nu} \equiv \partial_\lambda \left[ \frac{c^4}{8\pi G} (G_{\mu\nu} + \Lambda g_{\mu\nu}) \right] \cdot \chi_T$$
